html:
“Wearer becomes insane.”

-

The Nightmare Amulet is a craftable Item found in the Magic Filter. It costs 6 Gold Nuggets, 4 Nightmare Fuel, and 1 Purple Gem to craft and requires a Shadow Manipulator to prototype. It can also be dropped by an Ancient Pseudoscience Station when it is damaged with a Hammer, Gunpowder, etc. It can be equipped in the chest slot and lasts for 4 minutes (half of an in-game day).

While it's equipped, the Nightmare Amulet allows the player to experience the effects of 0 Sanity without actually setting the character's Sanity to 0. The screen will become distorted with the usual low Sanity effects, and Shadow Creatures will spawn. While under effects of the Nightmare Amulet, more Shadow Creatures will spawn and more frequently, compared to the player being insane without the amulet. During this time, the player's Sanity will start dropping by 3.33 per minute.

Contents

  • 1 Skins
  • 2 Tips
  • 3 Trivia
  • 4 Assets
  • 5 Gallery

Skins

Main article: Belongings

Woven - Elegant
Reliquary Collection
Qualming Amulet
Sometimes you gotta lose it, to find it.

Tips

  • This item can be useful for collecting items that are only available at low Sanity levels, such as Beard Hair and Nightmare Fuel, while still being able to opt out of the dangers of insanity at will.
  • This item can be especially useful when playing as Maxwell, since not only does his Sanity regeneration make it hard to go insane the normal way, but it also mitigates the Sanity loss caused by the Amulet.
  • Using the Nightmare Amulet to its full potential to farm Nightmare Fuel can yield around 20-24 Nightmare Fuel.
  • The Nightmare Amulet will almost always spawn a Shadow Creature upon equipping it. Paired with a low Sanity level, this can be utilized to spawn Shadow Creatures, and unequipping the amulet will not despawn them. This can be used to obtain more Nightmare Fuel.
  • The Nightmare Amulet can be used to lower one's Enlightenment on the Lunar Island.

Trivia

  • Description from patch notes of "Strange New Powers" update was: "Purple amulet - Dare to gaze upon the terrifying nightmare world." [1]
  • The Nightmare Amulet shares the same in-game model with Magiluminescence, but its gem is purple instead of yellow.
  • Prior to the The Stuff Of Nightmares update, the Nightmare Amulet actually restored 2 Sanity per minute, instead of reducing it.
  • This item was previously crafted from the Gemology Tab before the latter was removed from the game.
  • The gem in the Nightmare Amulet has eight corners; however, the Purple Gems used to craft it only have six.
  • According to Wickerbottom and Maxwell, the Nightmare Amulet communicates with the shadows.
  • Eating a Grim Galette while wearing a Nightmare Amulet will instantly kill the player due to its effects.
  • In Cursed Confrontation Part 1 update, the recipe uses 1 less Purple Gem and the duration is increased from 3.2 min to 4 min.

Assets

Nightmare AmuletQualming Amulet

“It's whispering to me.”
–Wilson
“Has science gone too far?”
–Willow
“This amulet... it frightens Wolfgang.”
–Wolfgang
“It's oozing.”
–Wendy
“THE PERFECT AMULET”
–WX-78
“I can almost sense it beckoning to something.”
–Wickerbottom
“The sparkle is gone from the gem.”
–Woodie
“It speaks with the shadow.”
–Maxwell
“An amulet öf dark pöwers.”
–Wigfrid
“Did you hear something?”
–Webber
“I must be crazy to fool around with this.”
–Warly
“Brain Neck Thing”
–Wormwood
“It's, uh, a purple necklace.”
–Winona
“I deserve these jewels, I think.”
–Wortox
“Glurp... don't wanna play with this anymore.”
–Wurt
“Do you hear the whispering too, Woby?”
–Walter
“Keep that thing away from me!”
–Wanda
“Wearer becomes insane.”
-
The Nightmare Amulet is a craftable Item found in the Magic Filter. It costs 6 Gold Nuggets, 4 Nightmare Fuel, and 1 Purple Gem to craft and requires a Shadow Manipulator to prototype. It can also be dropped by an Ancient Pseudoscience Station when it is damaged with a Hammer, Gunpowder, etc. It can be equipped in the chest slot and lasts for 4 minutes (half of an in-game day).
While it's equipped, the Nightmare Amulet allows the player to experience the effects of 0 Sanity without actually setting the character's Sanity to 0. The screen will become distorted with the usual low Sanity effects, and Shadow Creatures will spawn. While under effects of the Nightmare Amulet, more Shadow Creatures will spawn and more frequently, compared to the player being insane without the amulet. During this time, the player's Sanity will start dropping by 3.33 per minute.

Tips[edit | edit source]
This item can be useful for collecting items that are only available at low Sanity levels, such as Beard Hair and Nightmare Fuel, while still being able to opt out of the dangers of insanity at will.
This item can be especially useful when playing as Maxwell, since not only does his Sanity regeneration make it hard to go insane the normal way, but it also mitigates the Sanity loss caused by the Amulet.
Using the Nightmare Amulet to its full potential to farm Nightmare Fuel can yield around 20-24 Nightmare Fuel.
The Nightmare Amulet will almost always spawn a Shadow Creature upon equipping it. Paired with a low Sanity level, this can be utilized to spawn Shadow Creatures, and unequipping the amulet will not despawn them. This can be used to obtain more Nightmare Fuel.
The Nightmare Amulet can be used to lower one's Enlightenment on the Lunar Island.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
Description from patch notes of "Strange New Powers" update was: "Purple amulet - Dare to gaze upon the terrifying nightmare world." [1]
The Nightmare Amulet shares the same in-game model with Magiluminescence, but its gem is purple instead of yellow.
Prior to the The Stuff Of Nightmares update, the Nightmare Amulet actually restored 2 Sanity per minute, instead of reducing it.
This item was previously crafted from the Gemology Tab before the latter was removed from the game.
The gem in the Nightmare Amulet has eight corners; however, the Purple Gems used to craft it only have six.
According to Wickerbottom and Maxwell, the Nightmare Amulet communicates with the shadows.
Eating a Grim Galette while wearing a Nightmare Amulet will instantly kill the player due to its effects.
In Cursed Confrontation Part 1 update, the recipe uses 1 less Purple Gem and the duration is increased from 3.2 min to 4 min.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Bùa Ác Mộng là một Vật phẩm có thể chế tạo được tìm thấy trong Bộ Lọc Ma Thuật. Nó tốn 6 Vàng Thỏi, 4 Nhiên Liệu Ác Mộng và 1 Ngọc Tím để chế tạo và yêu cầu Người Điều Khiển Bóng Tối để tạo nguyên mẫu. Nó cũng có thể bị rơi ra bởi Trạm Giả khoa học Cổ đại khi bị hư hại bởi Búa, Thuốc súng, v.v. Nó có thể được trang bị trong khe rương và tồn tại trong 4 phút (nửa ngày trong trò chơi).
